name: Pin High Golf
address: 49 N Main St, North Grafton, MA 01536
about: Pin High Golf is a golf simulator training facility located in North Grafton, Massachusetts. The venue focuses on elite coaching and practice for golfers of all skill levels, with a particular emphasis on developing players for high-level competition. The facility offers simulator bay rentals and is operated by a PGA-certified coach with extensive experience working alongside top-tier instructors and elite players.
why_golfers_like_it: Elite coaching from a PGA-certified professional with 14 years of experience
Partnerships with specialized fitness and mental training providers
Focus on high-level performance development for serious players
Convenient simulator bay rentals for focused practice sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental policies, so it is recommended to bring your own equipment. Contact the facility directly for more information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information regarding outside food and drink policies. The venue does not mention having a kitchen or full bar service.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify time estimates for 18-hole simulator rounds. Appointment availability is noted as booking up quickly, suggesting sessions are likely scheduled in standard time blocks.

faq.question: Is Pin High Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding child-friendly amenities or junior programs mentioned on the website. The focus appears to be on elite coaching and serious practice.
